Name: Fraudulent/dishonest intent
Description: The accused must have acted with fraudulent or dishonest intent to use another's identity.

Name: Electronic signature or password used
Description: The unique identifier (password, PIN, OTP, biometric) of another person was used.

Name: Identity features belongs to victim
Description: The electronic identity feature used must belong to a real, identifiable victim.

Name: Personation via computer resource
Description: The accused communicated as a different entity using a computer resource or device.

Name: Inducement to deliver property/money
Description: The victim was induced to part with money or property through the impersonation.

Name: Use of communication device
Description: A communication device (phone, internet, app) was used as the medium of impersonation.

Name: Unauthorised access to computer system
Description: Access to a computer system without authorisation of the owner.

Name: Data theft or manipulation
Description: Electronic data was stolen or manipulated without authorisation.

Name: Breach of confidentiality
Description: A person with lawful access to electronic records disclosed them without consent.

Name: Breach of contractual duty of privacy
Description: Disclosure was in breach of a lawful contract or fiduciary duty.

Name: Deception of the victim
Description: The accused made false representations of fact that were believed by the victim.

Name: Fraudulent or dishonest inducement
Description: The victim acted on the deception and was thereby induced to act to their detriment.

Name: Delivery of property or financial loss
Description: The victim delivered money or property, or suffered financial loss.

Name: Damage to the deceived person
Description: The victim suffered actual measurable harm as a result of the deception.

Name: Pretending to be another person
Description: The accused claimed to be a government official or other person they are not.

Name: Knowledge of false identity
Description: The accused knew their claimed identity was false.

Name: Victim acted on false identity
Description: The victim's loss was a direct consequence of believing the false identity.

Name: Proceeds of crime involved
Description: The funds or property involved are proceeds of a scheduled offence.

Name: Layering or integration of funds
Description: Funds were moved through multiple accounts to obscure their origin.

Name: Knowingly facilitating money laundering
Description: The accused knew or had reason to believe the funds were proceeds of crime.

Name: Cross-border or crypto element
Description: Funds were moved internationally or converted to cryptocurrency to further conceal origin.

Name: Electronic record produced in proceedings
Description: The electronic evidence (screenshot, message log, transaction record) has been produced before the court.

Name: Certificate under Section 63 filed
Description: A certificate from the responsible person/officer confirming the device's proper operation has been filed.

Name: Device integrity established
Description: There is no evidence of tampering with the electronic evidence or the device it was obtained from.

Name: Hash value / chain of custody maintained
Description: The electronic evidence has a verifiable hash or chain of custody record.

Name: Summons for bank records issued
Description: Summons to bank or telecom operator for transaction logs or CDR records.

Name: Records produced and authenticated
Description: Bank statements or call records produced and authenticated by the institution.

Name: Witness summoned during investigation
Description: Witnesses called for examination during police investigation.

Name: Statement recorded under BNSS
Description: Statements recorded under the applicable BNSS provisions.
